newFeatures.title: New Authentication based on Keycloak
description: Redesign of the Console authentication layer based on Keycloak, enabling SSO, fine-grained role and permission management, and improved user lifecycle control.

newFeatures.title: Bridging Design expressiveness with Helm Charts
description: Configure your project resources using the intuitive interfaces within the Design Area sections (e.g. Microservices, Resources, Applications, ...) and get a read-only Helm chart view that automatically reflects your configuration.

newFeatures.title: Set the Commit & Deployment strategy via Helm for Console Projects
description: Set your Commit & Deploy Strategy in the Project Settings by choosing the type of Git Repo Project Configuration structure and whether to manage namespace deployments with Kustomize or with Helm.

newFeatures.title: Fast Data Control Plane v2 - Cross Namespace Management
description: To provide centralized management of the Fast Data v2 Runtime, the Control Plane will support access and control over all namespaces where Fast Data pipelines are deployed. Provisioning will be done via a dedicated Helm chart.

newFeatures.title: Guided Operations & Troubleshooting Interface on Control Plane v2
description: A Control Plane interface to perform ordered and guided operations.

newFeatures.title: New AI-Native Data Pipeline configurator
description: A visual, AI-assisted interface for configuring and managing end-to-end Fast Data pipelines, reducing manual effort and accelerating pipeline setup.

newFeatures.title: Data processing functions generation & testing with AI support
description: AI-powered generation of data processing functions with built-in testing capabilities, allowing validation of each pipeline step using fixed input data and expected output review.

newFeatures.title: Fast Data MCP Agent
description: An AI agent leveraging the Model Context Protocol to interact with Fast Data pipelines, enabling natural language-driven configuration and monitoring.

newFeatures.title: Items Versioning
description: Support for versioning of Context Catalog items, allowing users to track changes over time.

newFeatures.title: Items Lifecycle
description: Manage the full lifecycle of Context Catalog items — from creation to deprecation — with defined states and transitions that ensure governance and traceability across the organization.

newFeatures.title: Application management
description: Centralized management of applications within the Context Catalog, enabling teams to register, configure, and govern application assets in a unified catalog experience.

newFeatures.title: New Connectors
description: Expanding the Context Catalog with new out-of-the-box connectors for AWS, Kubernetes, and Jenkins, making it easier to integrate and govern assets from the most widely used cloud and DevOps platforms.

newFeatures.title: Business Glossary
description: A business glossary contains the definitions of commonly used business terms in an organization, serving as the single authoritative source for concepts and definitions. Users with enough permissions can define categories and terms to create the organization business catalog, enrich data assets with glossary terms, and search assets based on specific glossary terms.

newFeatures.title: Integration of Data Catalog in Context Catalog
description: Seamless integration between Data Catalog and Context Catalog, enabling users to discover and govern data assets directly within the unified Context Catalog experience.

newFeatures.title: Drag & Drop components
description: Intuitive drag-and-drop interface for placing, arranging, and managing UI components within the Microfrontend Composer, simplifying the visual design of microfrontend pages.

newFeatures.title: New Component Library
description: An expanded library of pre-built, ready-to-use UI components available in the Microfrontend Composer, accelerating page design and ensuring consistency across applications.

newFeatures.title: AI-Native Flows configuration
description: AI-assisted configuration of Flow Manager flows, enabling users to define and manage complex event-driven workflows with intelligent suggestions and automated setup.

newFeatures.title: Guided sagas and state machines Flow configuration
description: A guided interface for configuring sagas and state machines within the Flow Manager, simplifying the setup of complex orchestration patterns with step-by-step assistance.
